title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Delhivery

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
